triage_rows.direction: keep_prioritizing themes that regularly appear in policy, macro, commodity, and technology news before chasing long-tail concept names
expand alias coverage together with symbol mapping so registry growth can actually be reached by the hot-news classifier
prefer downstream symbol-level watch surfaces when beneficiary rows are already curated and avoid re-parsing theme strings in consumers

interpretation: The registry is no longer a tiny seed; it is now a broader curated layer intended to catch common recurring A-share themes.
The next gains should come from adding more high-frequency families and validating them against real incoming news, not from trying to enumerate every possible long-tail concept at once.
